entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cultivated legume being improved for yield and nutrient content

entities.name: CAJANUS PLATYCARPUS
entities.description: An annual wild relative of pigeonpea belonging to the tertiary genepool

entities.name: TERTIARY GENEPOOL
entities.description: A genetic group of wild relatives distant from the primary genepool of a crop

entities.name: EARLY MATURITY
entities.description: The characteristic of reaching maturity or flowering in a shorter duration

entities.name: HIGH PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The characteristic of having elevated levels of protein in the grain

entities.name: PHOTOPERIOD INSENSITIVITY
entities.description: The ability of a plant to flower regardless of the day length

entities.name: POD BORER TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist or tolerate damage from pod borer pests

entities.name: EMBRYO RESCUE TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A laboratory technique used to overcome cross-incompatibility in wild species crosses

entities.name: INTROGRESSION LINES
entities.description: Lines developed by transferring genetic material from a wild relative into a cultivated crop

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: An agronomic trait measuring the time until half of the population has flowered

entities.name: NUMBER OF PODS PER PLANT
entities.description: An agronomic trait measuring the quantity of pods produced per plant

entities.name: POD WEIGHT PER PLANT
entities.description: An agronomic trait measuring the total weight of pods produced per plant

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD PER PLANT
entities.description: An agronomic trait measuring the total weight of grain produced per plant

entities.name: GRAIN IRON
entities.description: The nutrient content of iron present in the grain

entities.name: GRAIN ZINC
entities.description: The nutrient content of zinc present in the grain

entities.name: GRAIN CALCIUM
entities.description: The nutrient content of calcium present in the grain

entities.name: GRAIN MAGNESIUM
entities.description: The nutrient content of magnesium present in the grain

entities.name: GENOTYPE X ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between the genetic makeup of a plant and its environment affecting trait expression

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: External factors and conditions that influence the growth and traits of the plants

entities.name: HYBRIDIZATION PROGRAMS
entities.description: Breeding programs that use cross-pollination to combine desirable traits

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAM
entities.description: A systematic process of improving crop traits through selection and crossing

entities.description: A popular mega variety of pigeonpea used as a check in evaluations
